triggers.name: Spirit of Wolf landed
triggers.pattern: ^You feel the spirit of wolf enter you\.

triggers.name: Spirit of Wolf gone
triggers.comments: spells_us_str 278; verified in Legends log. (NOT 'You feel yourself slow down' — that line was ruled out.) Pattern is byte-identical to generated buffs/wear-off/spirit-of-wolf so the engine's fire-dedupe collapses the pair to one spoken alert — keep them in sync.

triggers.name: Budding Heal on you
triggers.pattern: ^You feel a heal budding within you\.$
triggers.comments: Druid HoT rank at level 4. Verified spell data: CASTEDMETXT, formula 7 capped at 4 ticks (24 s). Curated because the generated buff packs skip its song-flagged spell record.

triggers.comments: Shared final-trigger message for the first five Druid growing-heal ranks. Cancelling every possible family timer is safe: missing timers are host no-ops.
